    Represents an empty message that does not perform any action when handled.

    end(String) - Method in class Controller.AbandonedStation.AbandonedStationLandState
    Ends the current player's turn and resumes the flight phase.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1ManageShotState
    Handles the end of a cannon shot by checking the player's ship for damage without using any batteries.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.CombatZone2ManageShotState
    Handles the end of a cannon shot by checking the player's ship for damage without using any batteries.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.Controller
     
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.MeteorsSwarm.ManageMeteorState
    Handles the logic when the player decides not to do anything during their turn.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.Pirates.PiratesManageShotState
    Resolves the effects of a cannon shot on a player's ship.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.Planets.ChoosePlanetState
    Called when a player decides to skip choosing a planet.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.Planets.PlanetsLandState
    Called when a player ends their interaction with the current planet.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersLandState
    Ends the player's reward phase.
    end(String) - Method in class Controller.State

    execute(Action) - Method in class View.Client.Client
    Executes the specified action on the current client state.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in interface View.Client.Actions.Action
    Executes the action on the given client state.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.ConnectAction
    Executes the connect action on the given client state.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.CreateGameAction
    Executes the action to create a new game with the specified match level.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.ExceptionAction
    Executes the action by logging the exception message.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.JoinAction
    Executes the action on the client state to join the specified game.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.JoinSuccessAction
    Executes the action by updating the client state to reflect the successful join operation.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.LoginAction
    Executes the login action on the given client state.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.LoginFailedAction
    Executes the action by updating the client state to reflect a failed login attempt.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.LoginSuccessAction
    Executes the login success action by updating the client state.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.UpdateGameAction
    Gets the game instance associated with this action.
    execute(ClientState) - Method in class View.Client.Actions.UpdateListAction
    Executes the action to update the client state with the new list of game IDs.
